policies.name: Customer Information Protection Policy
policies.description: AI Generated: Master policy governing the protection of customer information across the full data lifecycle, approved by the board per paragraph 8.2.
keyContents: Policy statements covering collection, access, storage, use, transmission, sharing, disclosure, and disposal

policies.name: Off-Site Work Arrangements Policy
policies.description: AI Generated: Policy governing access to customer information under off-site or remote work arrangements, including ICT equipment controls.

policies.name: Physical Document Handling and Transport Policy
policies.description: AI Generated: Policy governing the handling and transportation of physical documents containing customer information outside FSP premises.
keyContents: Off-site collection procedures for agents and representatives

policies.name: Portable IT Equipment and Storage Devices Policy
policies.description: AI Generated: Policy governing the use of portable IT equipment and data storage devices containing customer information, including USB controls.
keyContents: Authorised portable device types and register
USB port and CD writer management

policies.name: Customer Information Breach Incident Handling Policy
policies.description: AI Generated: Policy governing the handling of customer information breach incidents, covering both deliberate and non-deliberate breaches.
keyContents: Scope covering deliberate and non-deliberate breaches

policies.name: Access Control Policy for Customer Information
policies.description: AI Generated: Policy defining access control rules and requirements for all systems containing customer information, including role-based access and multi-level controls.
policies.owner: IAM Manager / Head of IT Security
keyContents: Access rights descriptions per role profile
Multi-level access controls (application, database, OS, network)
Periodic access review and certification process
Immediate revocation procedures for leavers and role changes

policies.name: Customer Information Disposal and Destruction Policy
policies.description: AI Generated: Policy governing the identification, disposal, and secure destruction of customer information no longer required.
keyContents: Data retention periods and legal requirements
Process for identifying data no longer required
Approved destruction methods (wiping, physical destruction, degaussing)
Random check requirements for outsourced providers

policies.name: Physical Security Policy for Customer Information Areas
policies.description: AI Generated: Policy defining physical security controls for areas where customer information is stored or processed in paper or electronic form.
policies.owner: Head of Facilities / Physical Security Manager
keyContents: Physical access control zones and classifications
Access restrictions for server rooms, filing rooms, and sensitive areas

policies.name: Acceptable Use Policy - Web and Social Media
policies.description: AI Generated: Policy restricting access to web-based communication and social media platforms for staff handling customer information.
keyContents: Restricted platforms (WhatsApp Desktop, Facebook, Skype Messenger, etc.)

policies.name: Permitted Disclosure of Customer Information Policy
policies.description: AI Generated: Policy governing conditions and controls for permitted disclosures of customer information under Schedule 11 FSA/IFSA and Fourth Schedule DFIA.
keyContents: Verification procedures for disclosure request authenticity
Appendix V application process for BNM-approved disclosures

policies.name: Outsourcing Policy - Customer Information Protection
policies.description: AI Generated: Policy governing customer information protection requirements for outsourced service provider arrangements.
policies.owner: Head of Vendor Management / Head of Procurement

policies.name: Staff Confidentiality and Information Protection Policy
policies.description: AI Generated: Policy covering staff obligations for customer information confidentiality, including deterrent mechanisms and consequences for non-compliance.
policies.owner: Head of HR / Head of Compliance
keyContents: Personal device restrictions in high-risk areas

procedures.name: Customer Information Breach Response Procedure
procedures.description: AI Generated: Step-by-step procedure for responding to customer information breaches, from detection through containment, investigation, notification, and remediation.

procedures.name: BNM Breach Notification Procedure
procedures.description: AI Generated: Procedure for notifying BNM of customer information breaches meeting the notification criteria, including the three triggers and phased notification process.
keyContents: Three notification triggers and assessment criteria
Phased notification process for incomplete information

procedures.name: Breach Investigation Procedure
procedures.description: AI Generated: Procedure for conducting customer information breach investigations, including competent party requirements, independent oversight, and BNM reporting.
keyContents: BNM submission procedure (one working day after Board tabling)

procedures.name: Customer Breach Notification Procedure
procedures.description: AI Generated: Procedure for notifying affected customers of breaches causing or likely to cause significant harm, including direct and public notification methods.
procedures.owner: Designated Officer (per 9.2) / Head of Customer Relations
keyContents: Significant harm trigger for customer notification
Staff training for handling customer queries

procedures.name: Access Rights Review and Revocation Procedure
procedures.description: AI Generated: Procedure for regular review of staff access rights to customer information and immediate revocation upon departure or role change.
keyContents: Periodic access review schedule and process

procedures.name: Secure Data Destruction Procedure
procedures.description: AI Generated: Procedure for securely disposing of customer information in paper and digital forms, including outsourced destruction controls.
keyContents: Data identification and disposal approval process
Approved destruction methods per media type
Random check schedule for outsourced providers

procedures.name: OSP Due Diligence and Onboarding Procedure
procedures.description: AI Generated: Procedure for conducting due diligence on outsourced service providers with access to customer information.
keyContents: Due diligence assessment scope and criteria
Risk rating and monitoring level determination

procedures.name: Biennial OSP Review Procedure
procedures.description: AI Generated: Procedure for conducting biennial reviews of outsourced service providers to confirm compliance with contractual customer information obligations.

procedures.name: Permitted Disclosure Processing Procedure
procedures.description: AI Generated: Procedure for processing permitted disclosure requests, including verification, documentation, approval, and Appendix V applications.
keyContents: Authenticity verification steps per request type
Appendix V completion and submission process

procedures.name: New Staff Onboarding - Customer Information Protection
procedures.description: AI Generated: Procedure for onboarding new staff with specific training on customer information protection policies, procedures, and consequences for non-compliance.
procedures.owner: Head of HR / Learning and Development

procedures.name: Customer Information Detection and Monitoring Procedure
procedures.description: AI Generated: Procedure for detecting unauthorised access, unusual viewing, suspicious downloads, and unauthorised disclosure of customer information.
procedures.owner: SOC Manager / Head of IT Security
keyContents: Detection rules and thresholds for each category

governance.name: Board Customer Information Governance Charter
governance.description: AI Generated: Charter defining the board's oversight responsibilities for customer information protection, including reporting requirements and review cycles.

governance.name: Designated Officer Terms of Reference
governance.description: AI Generated: Terms of reference for the designated officer responsible for MCIPD implementation, covering policy communication and stakeholder coordination duties.
keyContents: Reporting lines to board and senior management

governance.name: Senior Management Accountability Framework - Customer Information
governance.description: AI Generated: Framework defining senior management accountability for customer information protection, including RACI matrix and business line responsibilities.
keyContents: RACI matrix for customer information protection
Accountability for representative and agent conduct

governance.name: Customer Information Risk Assessment Framework
governance.description: AI Generated: Framework for identifying, assessing, and mitigating threats and vulnerabilities to customer information, including third-party risks.

evidence.name: Customer Information Breach Register
evidence.description: AI Generated: Centralised register recording all customer information breaches with root causes, remedial actions, and lessons learnt.

evidence.name: Customer Information Data Map
evidence.description: AI Generated: Map identifying the location of customer information across all systems, supporting access control and risk assessment activities.
keyContents: Data types and classifications per system

evidence.name: Staff Confidentiality Undertaking Records
evidence.description: AI Generated: Records of confidentiality undertakings signed by all staff as part of employment contracts, specifying legal obligations and consequences.
evidence.reviewFrequency: Continuous at hiring, annual compliance check

evidence.name: Customer Information Protection Training Records
evidence.description: AI Generated: Records of training completion for customer information protection, including FSP staff, representatives, and agents.
keyContents: Completion rates by department and staff category

evidence.name: Training Effectiveness Assessment Records
evidence.description: AI Generated: Records demonstrating measurement of training effectiveness, including awareness surveys, assessment results, and trend analysis.

evidence.name: Outsourced Service Provider Register
evidence.description: AI Generated: Register of all outsourced service providers with access to customer information, including risk ratings, due diligence status, and review schedules.

evidence.name: Access Rights Review Records
evidence.description: AI Generated: Records of periodic access rights reviews and immediate access revocations for departing or role-changing staff.
evidence.reviewFrequency: Quarterly for privileged, semi-annual for standard

evidence.name: Authorised Portable Storage Device Register
evidence.description: AI Generated: Register of authorised portable storage devices and their users, with business need justification.

evidence.name: External Vendor Personnel Vetting Records
evidence.description: AI Generated: Records of vetting and monitoring conducted on external vendor personnel working on FSP premises.
keyContents: Personnel access records for sensitive areas

evidence.name: Permitted Disclosure Register
evidence.description: AI Generated: Register of all permitted disclosures of customer information made under the FSA, IFSA, and DFIA, with verification and approval records.

evidence.name: Certificates of Destruction
evidence.description: AI Generated: Certificates of destruction for customer information securely disposed of, including both in-house and outsourced destruction.

evidence.name: OSP Customer Information Sharing Audit Trail
evidence.description: AI Generated: Audit trail of all customer information shared with or given to outsourced service providers.

logs.name: Customer Information Access Audit Trail
logs.description: AI Generated: System logs recording access to customer information for audit trail review and detection of unauthorised or unusual activity.

logs.name: BNM and Customer Breach Notification Log
logs.description: AI Generated: Log of all breach notifications made to BNM, law enforcement, and affected customers, with timestamps and content records.

logs.name: Policy Communication and Distribution Log
logs.description: AI Generated: Log recording policy communications and distributions by the designated officer to ensure staff awareness and accessibility.

logs.name: Physical Access Log for Restricted Areas
logs.description: AI Generated: Access logs for restricted areas where customer information is stored, such as server rooms and filing rooms.

logs.name: Outsourced Destruction Random Check Log
logs.description: AI Generated: Log of random checks conducted on outsourced service providers' collection and destruction processes.
logs.reviewFrequency: Per check event, at least quarterly

reports.name: Board Report on Customer Information Management
reports.description: AI Generated: Periodic report from senior management to the board on customer information management, including risk assessments, findings, and mitigation plans.

reports.name: Annual Written Assurance to Board
reports.description: AI Generated: Annual written assurance from senior management to the board confirming effectiveness of customer information controls and OSP compliance.

reports.name: Independent Review Report - Customer Information Protection
reports.description: AI Generated: Biennial independent review report assessing effectiveness of customer information protection policies, procedures, and controls.

reports.name: Independent Review Remediation Tracker
reports.description: AI Generated: Tracker for remediation actions arising from independent review findings, with owner, deadline, and status tracking.

reports.name: Detailed Breach Investigation Report
reports.description: AI Generated: Detailed investigation report for customer information breaches, including root cause analysis and remedial actions, for Board tabling and BNM submission.

reports.name: Customer Information Risk Assessment Report
reports.description: AI Generated: Periodic risk assessment report covering threats and vulnerabilities to customer information, including third-party risks and mitigation plans.
keyContents: Mitigation plans with owners and timelines

reports.name: OSP Due Diligence Assessment Report
reports.description: AI Generated: Due diligence assessment report for each outsourced service provider with access to customer information.

reports.name: OSP Biennial Review Report
reports.description: AI Generated: Report from the biennial review of each outsourced service provider confirming compliance with contractual customer information obligations.
reports.owner: Head of Vendor Management / Internal Audit

reports.name: Staff Awareness Survey Report
reports.description: AI Generated: Report on annual awareness survey results assessing staff understanding of customer information protection obligations.

reports.name: Board Breach Notification and Investigation Report
reports.description: AI Generated: Report from senior management to the board on detected breaches, investigation findings, and actions taken.
reports.reviewFrequency: Per breach event or as part of quarterly board report
